title: AI-first team wiki SaaS
idea: A B2B SaaS wiki that auto-summarizes Slack and meeting transcripts into living docs. Pricing: $12/seat/month, minimum 10 seats. Differentiator is 'docs that update themselves' via weekly AI refresh jobs. Integrations: Slack, Google Meet, Notion import. Sold to series-A startups that already pay for Notion + Slack. Founder thesis: Notion is passive storage; this product is active knowledge maintenance.
focus_notes: Churn if AI summaries are wrong or noisy
Seat-min friction vs Notion free habit
Whether 'auto-update' creates trust issues with wrong edits
